tavern_common.name: The Rusted Flagon - Common Room
tavern_common.description: A dim, smoky tavern. Firelight catches on pewter tankards. The air smells of tallow and old wood.

tavern_cellar.name: The Rusted Flagon - Cellar
tavern_cellar.description: Low stone arches, barrels stacked high, a faint smell of mildew and spilled wine.

tavern_backroom.name: The Rusted Flagon - Back Room
tavern_backroom.description: A narrow room used for private dealings. One guttering candle on a scarred table.

market_square.name: Ashford Market Square
market_square.description: A cobbled square ringed by shuttered stalls. A covered well stands at its centre.

gareth_barkeep.name: Gareth
gareth_barkeep.description: A broad-shouldered barkeep with a salt-and-pepper beard and watchful grey eyes.
gareth_barkeep.personality: Guarded but fair. Speaks in short sentences. Respects those who pay their tab. Distrusts the Guild.
knowledge: A merchant named Aldric Voss went missing three days ago after meeting someone in the back room.
The Merchants Guild has been pressuring local traders.
There is a locked strongbox hidden behind the third barrel on the east wall of the cellar.
The town guard captain Maren is on the Guild's payroll.
secrets: Gareth saw a Guild enforcer named Thorn leave the backroom the night Aldric vanished.
The strongbox contains Aldric's ledger - proof of Guild extortion.

lira_barmaid.name: Lira
lira_barmaid.description: A young woman with ink-stained fingers and an overly cheerful demeanour that doesn't reach her eyes.
lira_barmaid.personality: Nervous, eager to please, hiding something. Talks too much when frightened.
knowledge: Aldric was a regular. He always ordered the house wine and sat by the window.
A hooded figure waited for Aldric in the back room.
secrets: Lira was paid by the Guild to report on who Aldric spoke to.
She deeply regrets it and fears for her safety.

house_wine_bottle.name: Bottle of House Wine
house_wine_bottle.description: A dark bottle with a wax seal. Cheap but honest.

torn_note.name: Torn Note
torn_note.description: A scrap of parchment with the words 'THE CELLAR - MIDNIGHT' in hurried script.

rules: NPCs only reveal secrets if trust >= 30 or player presents compelling evidence.
Players cannot enter locked areas without a key or a reason accepted by the NPC.
NPCs will not admit Guild involvement until confronted with direct evidence.
Violence is possible but immediately raises world tension (PLAYER_FLAG_SET tension += 1).
The strongbox cannot be opened without the key (not yet in world).
